message:
fix(ci): add fixture generation and fix workflow issues

- Add Python setup and fixture generation step to node-ci and coverage workflows
- Fix browser-e2e to install @playwright/test locally in packages/browser
- Fix benchmark.yml YAML syntax errors (broken string literals)

files.patch:
@@ -38,15 +38,17 @@ jobs:
       - name: Copy WASM to examples
         run: cp zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm examples/wasm/
 
-      - name: Install Playwright
-        run: npm install -g @playwright/test
+      - name: Install dependencies and Playwright
+        working-directory: packages/browser
+        run: npm install @playwright/test
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
 
       - name: Run E2E tests
-        run: npx playwright test --project=chromium
         working-directory: packages/browser
+        run: npx playwright test --project=chromium
 
       - name: Upload Playwright report
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4

@@ -12,6 +12,17 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.11'
+
+      - name: Install Python dependencies
+        run: pip install pylance pyarrow numpy
+
+      - name: Generate test fixtures
+        run: python fixtures/generate.py
+
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:

@@ -75,6 +75,17 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.11'
+
+      - name: Install Python dependencies
+        run: pip install pylance pyarrow numpy
+
+      - name: Generate test fixtures
+        run: python fixtures/generate.py
+
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
